history.content: Hey — I’m here and ready to dive into whatever you need.
OKay - SO Im going to give you your own X/twitter account for you to start posting on. In order to begin promoting Smallclaw. Use the agent builder to create a scheduled post at 9:15PM Every day

Workflow “Daily SmallClaw Promotion on X/Twitter” is architected to post every day at 9:15 PM local time, but it still needs the X API [REDACTED] credential and an authoring subagent configured before it can actually run—let me know when you’re ready to provide those (and confirm you still want me to activate the schedule).
